bio:
Passionate about Artificial Intelligence and data, I believe technology must serve people and business performance. My approach combines scientific rigor with engineering pragmatism: I design solutions that don't stay at the prototype stage but go into production and create value.

Mindful of the ethical challenges of AI, I commit to developing responsible, explainable, and fair systems. Drawn to the Swiss ecosystem — its research excellence, culture of precision, and technological dynamism — I seek to contribute to ambitious projects at the heart of European innovation.
